review_text: Great location, friendly staff and facilities. BBQ pavilion easily accomodates multiple groups and is cleaned daily, great facilities- common fridge, microwave, kettle, toaster etc. Walking distance to shore, shops and mini golf. The park   are putting in more cabins. Will come back again as a base to explore Fraser Is by jetski

Great park friendly staff, the managers are fantastic people. Dogs allowed if you're in a caravan/camper/tent but not the cabins.
They are building more cabins atm just about finished.
There's a games room for kids two pools and jumping pillow.
Awesome vibe in this park! Super grateful to have an ensuite site at such short notice. The lovely staff member went above & beyond for us to make this happen. Thank you.
I stayed in the safari tent. Just perfect.  Bed was so comfy, furnishings were great. Wish I was booked in for longer .....
Smaller type park but th facilitied are clean and modern. Plus the showers are big with ultra hot xater.  The sites are good sized and the shops, beach and pub 3 blocks away.

Abbiamo dormito qui due notti non consecutive. Entrambe le volte il bungalow era in buone condizioni, cucina con detersivo e spugna per i piatti e stoviglie varie. Wifi molto debole in tutte le diverse zone del campeggio dove abbiamo dormito. Orari della reception molto limitati - si trova qualcuno solo tra le 9 e le 17. Il check in fuori orario viene gestito tramite una cassetta di sicurezza all'entrata dove sono riposte le chiavi e le informazioni necessarie (mappa campeggio ecc). Fino a qui tutto bene, se non fosse che il codice per aprire la cassetta viene inviato via sms ma solo se il tuo numero è australiano, ma lo abbiamo scoperto solo in un secondo momento. Noi infatti non lo avevamo ricevuto e non siamo subito riusciti ad accedere alla struttura. Abbiamo avuto fortuna perche in quel momento una dei responsabili stava uscendo dal campeggio per una passeggiata e ci ha detto a voce il codice...sarebbe bastato inviare una semplice mail. Per il resto l'esperienza è stata positiva!
Had 6 days over Easter in a cabin every thing was great. Cabin vert clean

Good rooms. The single beds a bit on the small side. Nice location. Very secure. Key fobs in and out. Lots of wildlife. Turtles, eels and water fowl in the lake. Ghekos above the door at night keep the insects down.
Only one functioning BBQ area that is super filthy and lots of construction.

Wir hatten einen Rasenplatz mit Stromanschluss. Hervey Bay hat uns gut gefallen. Wir haben beschlossen eine zweite Nacht zu bleiben.  Diesmal nahmen wir einen Platz mit WC und Dusche: perfekt. In der Rezeption wurden wir freundlich und kompetent behandelt. Wir bekamen Tipps für die Stadt. Die sanitären Einrichtungen sowie der Pool waren in einem sehr sauberen Zustand. Alles war ordentlich.  Selbst die Arbeiter,  die hier arbeiteten waren sehr rücksichtsvoll.
Wir bekamen sogar Futter um die Schildkröten zu füttern. Der gesamte Platz war sehr ruhig. Und die Preise waren nicht so teuer. Nun geht unsere Reise weiter. Leider können wir nicht mehr hierher kommen.  Bald müssen wir nach Deutschland zurück.
Best regards

Although the facilities were adequate there were two issues that were very annoying:
1. The non-stop from dawn 'til dusk noise from a flock of pigeons which constantly & completely dominated all other sounds.  Not a peaceful stay at all.
2. Wifi was slow and unreliable.
So, if you want any kind of peace don't stay there (or take ear-muffs!)  and don't rely on good park Wifi.

This is our 6th visit to this great holiday park, and it won't be our last.  They are continually upgrading the park and facilities to make it the best in Hervey Bay.  Lots of staff always on site, cleaning, gardening, performing maintenance, etc.  Reception staff are friendly and helpful.  Onsite cabins are clean and well presented.  Swimming pool is always clean and tidy.

We had a wonderful camping stay at Discovery Parks - Hervey Bay. The amenities were spotless and very well maintained, which always makes such a difference when camping. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming — both in the office and around the grounds — and nothing was too much trouble.

The pool was sparkling clean and so inviting. It was reassuring to see staff checking the water several times a day, showing how much they care about guests’ comfort and safety. The camp kitchen was lovely and welcoming, making it easy to relax and enjoy meals.

The location is fantastic too — close to the beach and within easy reach of food and drink options. We would happily stay again!

Perfect, everything is great, the reception Ms. Min is so nice and kind, we had a wonderful night at this camp, we also had a barbecue, there are lots of birds and turtles, kids love it so much.This is the best accommodation we had in our first trip in Australia!
Nice and quiet cabin was very clean and comfortable
Great location at a reasonable price and friendly staff.
Great spot

We stayed a week at Discovery Parks – Torquay on Fraser Street and had a great experience. We asked to be located close to the jumping pillow and pool, and this was accommodated with pleasure.

The pool was fantastic and kept at a very comfortable temperature. The games room is dated but very well equipped. Our daughter loved learning how to play ping pong and spending time on the jumping pillow.

The ensuite was very clean and well stocked.

Staff were genuinely lovely throughout our stay.

Great location and close to the beaches.
Amazing place to relax. Staff are very friendly. We will definitely be back 🙂
Loved it, well looked after park and very clean.

Beautiful Park. Upon entry Friendly Staff. Clean. Well maintained landscape. Lake is an amazing bonus with the turtles. So much to do on the grounds for kids and adults alike with tennis, basketball hoop, games room, the 2 pools, jumping pillow, feeding the turtles and ducks and carts. The grounds kitchen is amazing, well equipped and again very clean. Close proximity to the boulevard (4-minute walk) Thankyou :)
We've been coming here for 3 years and we've always had a great time!! The staff are very friendly. We'll keep coming back as often as we can!! Thank you so much

Wow, wow, wow. This place is huge! Our site was amazing (being opposite amenities and pool at the rear of the park past the lake crossing) and very clean. We stayed for 8 nights over Christmas and New year. There was heaps for the kids to do including kids club and ample space to ride bikes. Park staff provided movie nights, breakfast gatherings and lots of other fun activities. The lake that runs through the park is home to ducks, turtles, eels and fish which reception have free food to feed them. We were very comfortable during our stay and would come back without hesitation. Thanks for a wonderful stay everyone!
Schöner Wohnmobil Park
Brilliant!

Fraser St Hervey Bay, one of the nicest parks we have stayed at in our 8 months of travels. Perfect setting close to Esplanade, cafes and restaurants. Staff are amazing and so helpful. Grounds with green grass for your poops and ensuite sites are a plus
sehr schöne, gutlegene Anlage. saubere, grossräumige Bungalows,mit allem ausgestattet, was man braucht, WLan nicht zu gebrauchen, aber für einen Campingplatz vielleicht auch noch unbedingt notwendig

The staff in the office and ground staff are so friendly and welcoming. The park is very secure and safe, we stayed on an ensuite site 10 out of 10, the grounds are kept beautifully, it has a lagoon with heaps of turtles and fish that kids can feed(the feed is free from the office) the amenities are spotless, the 2 pools are beautiful, the park is 250m to the waterfront, cafe's, supermarkets etc. Honestly one of the best holiday parks we have stayed at on our journey up and down the east coast since leaving home in Fingal bay in April this year and its pet friendly. We will be recommending 💯 this holiday park to friends and other travellers, thank you so much for our stay at Discovery park Fraser St Hervey Bay.we will most certainly be back to stay here. Congratulations to all staff members, keep up the great work.
Walking distance to the beach and shops (pub & icecream shop).Only thing that would make caravan Park better is having double concrete slab.

Wife and I wanted a few days away from home and chose this resort as it had 'glamping' accommodation,  which we'd like to try.
The staff were really nice,  even saw we were lost looking for our room and came and showed us the way.
The 'glamp' was incredible  ... bed sooo comfortable,  the ensuite spotless and well appointed with body wash and shampoo dispensers, and the location was great, overlooking a pond, with masses of turtles and water birds.The variety of birdlife was incredible too, some very tame and sat on the rail hoping for a tidbit of food.

One thing which impressed us was the "ensuite blocks', which were assigned to each caravan location, rather than the usual communal showers and toilets.

Overall, we'd recommend this resort to anyone, especially families, as there is ample to keep kids occupied in this secure environment.
Congratulations and well done!!!
Recomanded

Loved the proximity to the main Esplanade and the quiet of this caravan park with its trees and lagoon. It is beautifully kept even when very busy
We enjoyed an ensuite site, the ensuite was modern and clean. Great camp kitchen.
The manager, Amanda, and her team were extremely friendly and helpful. They supported us during a medical emergency and checked in to make sure we were OK during the rest of our stay. Other guests were also very friendly.
We highly recommend this caravan park and look forward to our next visit

Review Discovery Parks - Fraser Street, Hervey Bay

Initial Booking Process
The quality of the service itself was unparalleled from the initial booking enquire to the handing back of the key. Each aspect of our booking and was handled with the utmost care and attention to detail. It was evident that the team was highly skilled and knowledgeable, ensuring that everything was completed to the highest standard.
Service Quality
The timeliness of the service was a highlight. Every goal was met promptly, and communication was maintained throughout our prolonged stay, keeping me informed at every stage. This dedication to punctuality and transparency was deeply appreciated.
The general condition of the park and the facilities is outstanding. The attention to detail makes your stay a very pleasant experience knowing that all WHS areas have been addressed to ensure that you and your family have a safe and incident free holiday.
Customer Support
The customer support provided was exceptional. Any concerns or inquiries I had were addressed swiftly and thoroughly. The support team was always available, and their problem-solving abilities were impressive, ensuring that any issue was resolved efficiently. The staff’s assistance to guests was above and beyond in all areas from assistance with positioning caravans, arranging surprise birthdays, anniversaries and funding raising activities. Also with general information and support with local maintenance providers for vehicles and general local knowledge.
Overall Experience
Overall, my experience was nothing short of fantastic. The combination of a great location a safe environment made for a seamless and enjoyable experience. I would highly recommend this facility to anyone seeking excellence in their family or private getaway.
Thank you for delivering such outstanding service. It truly made a difference.

We booked direct with the park and found this to be great value.   Very pleasant staff on arrival and through stay.  We stayed in Feb this year and upgrades have been done since  we look forward to another stay booked in December.  The cabins are very quiet and pleasant by the lake.  A very clean park and cabin and an easy walk to facilities and shopping at the beach. A short drive to marina etc.  well run park and good value

We had a lovely holiday at the Fraser Street Discovery Park in January and stayed in a cabin. The cabin was spotless.
The staff in the park were very friendly and helpful. We enjoyed it so much we have booked in for another two weeks at the end of the year.

We stayed in an ensuite site in our caravan. What an amazing time we've had. The luxurious touch of the Ink & Water brand range of toiletries in 500ml bottles is amazing, not even those tiny hotel bottles. I've thoroughly enjoyed my showers under the waterfall shower roses, in the nicely refurbished ensuites. Discovery Hervey Bay you rock! Your staff is incredibly friendly and helpful, the park is well located, clean and well set out and affordably priced. We will definitely be back. Thank you so very much for making our stay feel like a high end luxury resort.

Well equipped park, nice clean kitchen area and several bathrooms. Also has a few swimming pools.
The kitchen was surprisingly clean and well equipped.
On a negative note, one of the reception ladies was quite rude and wouldn't give us change for the washing machine that only that coins and not card. It was 17:14, yes they close at 17.00hr reception but she was still there and could have changed up a 10 dollar bill for the customer to be able to spend money and wash some laundry! Instead ignored the customer and then said, no, come back tomorrow at 9am. We were departing at 7am. So thanks.
Other than the miserable staff, the parks pretty good.
Camped 2night Sept 2025 with ensuite.

Fab caravan site. Lots of toilets and showers
Staff were so helpful and friendly
Free turtle feed at reception to feed the turtles
Good sized camp kitchen
Good sized site
Good location

We stayed in a two bedroom deluxe cabin for two nights. Good experience overall - comfortable bed, good shower, quiet location near the back of the park. Good kitchen set up, also appreciated the in-cabin washing machine so that we could get some laundry done. The park has good security, requiring a fob to get in and I understand the gates are shut at night. A 5 minute walk to the local shops and restaurants. Parking is a bit tight but would be OK if you drive a small car.

Super sauberer Platz, gut in der Nähe vom Strand gelegen. Freundliches und nettes Personal rundum zufrieden. Zimmer ohne Bewertung wir waren mit dem Camper da. Wahltouren sind zwischen Juni und Oktober zu empfehlen
Just wanted to say a very big thank you to ANA. Always smiling and willing to help in any way she can. David and Heather

Price is most affordable if you go directly through the website.
Customer service 10/10. The person at the front desk that greeted us was so incredibly lovely, so were the other staff on the grounds.
The villa was easy to find, and parking was on site. The room was fresh and inviting. Lots of windows that allow great air flow. The rooms don't smell, the linen is clean, the bed is soft and comfortable. Great playground, jumping pillow and pool for the kids. Plenty of nature around and the beach is walking distance. I wish I could stay more than one night. I'll book a week next time. Oh, and the holiday park is busy but some how very quiet. Despite being full, you would think you had your own private property 5pm onward.

We chose this campground in Hervey Bay because it is a beautiful area, perfect as a base for whale watching and also to take a day to relax. Overall, the location is lovely and we enjoyed our stay. However, there are some points worth mentioning.
The price was one of the highest we paid on our trip from Cairns down to Brisbane, but the sites were relatively small and the access roads quite narrow. We saw a caravan struggling for half an hour to park, because his access was blocked by scaffolding that had been put up for ongoing construction work.During our stay, there was construction right next to the pool and facilities. On the day we arrived, the noise was extreme, and some of the showers were closed due to previous roof damage. The following day the workers were gone, but the site was still under construction, which meant detours to the kitchen area. Such things happen but we would have been liked to be informed prior to arrival to have the chance to stay somewhere else on our holiday. Another issue was the heavy front gate, which is on a timer. On checkout, the time allowed to open the gate and drop off the key in the box was not enough to drive back through with a campervan. Without help from other campers, we wouldn’t have been able to leave. There was no intercom, phone, or other way to contact reception from the gate, which added to the frustration and left us feeling somewhat “locked in.”
On the positive side, the facilities were clean, if a little dated, and we had a nice shaded site under the palm trees. Still, the overall price-to-value ratio was disappointing. For the cost, we expected more – and unfortunately, that “more” was not delivered.
Would highly recommend. Busy but peaceful.

The staff are extremely friendly, helpful in keeping us posted with what's happening around the place. Ground staff are really friendly always courteous and polite, they do a great job keeping the grounds looking good.
Reception, well both girls are just lovely, polite, very welcoming, friendly at all times, always helpful, they need a pay rise with some of the negative stuff some people throw at them. Keep up the great work girls. We are very happy to be here,  the staff 😀are lovely, this is why we come back. Always look after your staff,  especially in a business like this where they have so much contact with the public.
Housekeeping staff are very friendly, always a smile in place, always very busy, but always time for a chat to.
The managers are really helpful, busy in reception, with check ins and out. Very friendly Amanda and John, thank you for looking after us, nothing was a problem.

We stayed in a superior cabin. It was very spacious, extremely clean and nice comfortable bed. Friendly staff with great facilities throughout the park which were well maintained. The location is fantastic, highly recommend 😊

We booked a site with an ensuite. It was clean and spacious! The place was 100% packed. Sites are well maintained with 2 level pads for the caravan wheels.
I would have rated this park higher if it wasn't for the noisey workers operating grinder, chainsaw, etc.
Caravan site, good size and easy to park.  Amenities very clean,park is very clean.

We did learn not to book a cabin again that had a joining cabin, you can hear your neighbours very clearly!!!!! The cabin itself was great, facilities excellent and the staff were very cheerful and helpful.

A very friendly, clean and handy park close to the esplanade (5 min walk).
Great sites for vans with plenty of space.
En-suite sites also excellent and serviced after 4 days but a change of towels still no issue if needed prior.
Very helpful and happy staff throughout the park.
A pleasure to have stayed here and one that we hope to return to.
Thank you.
Beautiful location work lovely clean rooms. Min was really awesome helping us out of hours with some travel issues we were having.  Thanks so much!

We had incredible service from Min who went out of her way after hours to solve a very botched up itinerary booking elsewhere. She gave us options to put our minds to rest so that we could continue our holiday
Thanks so much Min!!!!

Only had a 1 night stay and booked the day before. Staff went above and beyond to provide me a cabin which suited my needs. Location was perfect, cabin was clean, tidy and had everything needed. Thanks.
We stayed in a Deluxe Cabin, very spacious  couldn't hear outside traffic.  The Discovery Park is great for families.

We've stayed at your very pretty park for 5 years in our caravan, and love this very friendly park.... it's very secure and close to everything. We however could not watch TV hardly ever due to bad reception....the cable didn't help either. The power cut out a few times also...the park needs a booster aerial, as other parks, that we've stayed in have done. Cheers Davia 🤗

With my family we rented 4 safari tents for 2 nights - 11 of us - they were so modern, fresh and comfortable. They were grouped together but not too close and included a grassed area by the lake where we could gather - the grandkids enjoyed the wildlife in the lake and all the other kids activities. The staff were great and assisted with an early check in and late checkout where they could for 2 different cbins.|Recommend them highly and we'll be back.

Stayed 4 nights in July while visiting Hervey Bay. May be closer to 3.5 stars but no real complaints. Booking and reception were both well handled. Cabin was roomy, reasonably equipped and well cleaned on arrival. Furniture is a bit tired but still quite ok. Park was really busy and a bit crowded but still orderly. Reception staff were friendly and helpful. Location is very good.
This is a beautiful place to stay. The cabins are comfy, clean, and spacious. The staff are lovely and welcoming.
Recently stayed in a Cabin for 3 nights which suited our requirements,. Cabin was clean and tidy and close to all ammenities.

Stayed at an ensuite site for a week. Was a lovely spot. Only a short walk to the shops, restaurants, cafes and beach. Kids had a blast in the pool. Gated Park, which was great especially since we unexpectedly had to spend a night away from our caravan.
Staff were very friendly and the park had lots going on for the holidays which was great.

Great staff, great and Very Well maintained grounds. We swam in both pools, played Tennis, basketball, great games room , bouncing pillow and feeding the ducks and turtles was a daily quaking good time!! Great location to all the good things to do in Hervey Bay!! Thank you for having us!!!
Great place to stay. We stayed at an ensuite site. Ensuite was nice and clean and perfect for our family. Park had plenty for kids to do. Staff very friendly.
Very handy to beach and shops. Fabulous bicycle/walking paths to get around on. Was in motorhome, so didn't use cabins. Very clean and tidy park. Had an ensuite & powered site. Ensuite was spotless!

Wonderful Service and a Great Stay

Staff were amazing – they couldn’t do enough for us. The new lady at reception (I can’t remember her name) was so sympathetic and helpful when there was a mix-up with our site. She and the new ground staff member (also new, and sadly I didn’t catch her name either) went above and beyond to rectify the situation and make our stay comfortable.

We had a powered site with an ensuite – the ensuite was very clean, and the park is in a great location. It was a group booking with our friends, and although our bookings were moved and we weren’t placed close together at first, the staff sorted everything out. Both families were given a full refund for the 4 days, which was incredibly generous.

Definitely will come back – excellent customer service and a great park overall !!
Fantastic park has the best camp kitchen we have ever seen 2 pools tennis court basketball hoop great for kids will definitely be back loved it
Stayed there for 1 month we where very pleased with park staff was the friendly very clean the best caravan we have stayed Thanks to all staff
Great spot. Really good service. Love that I'm under 5 minutes walk from the beach too. Was a great stay.
Reception staff went out of their way to accommodate us. All staff are so friendly and helpful and the ensuites are immaculate. We’ll be back for sure.
Sometimes the reception staff put you off before you even stayed and that’s what happened here

This is one of the best parks we have stayed in. Staff are super friendly and helpful, sites were really well maintained, the pool was outstanding and the location was safe. There is a natural lake with turtles, ducks and fish. Nice spot for people travelling with dogs and an easy walk down to the Esplanade and the beach. Picked a two weeks for the price of one so very well priced.
The Cabins are great, clean,& have all you need in them.

Sehr schöner Campingplatz.
Wir sind insgesamt 3 Nächte geblieben.
Das mehr ist direkt vor der Tür und man mehrere Möglichkeiten für Kaffee und Essen.
Die nächsten Supermärkte sind z.b. mit dem Bus zu erreichen oder ein kleiner Par auch Fuß läufig.
Great park. Amazing ensuite sites wth thoughtful extras
Very nice clean park

Absolutely beautiful place.
Great staff and a great location.
Especially the fact we can bring our Fur baby with us

We only stayed one night in a van here but upon arrival the staff were very friendly. It was unfortunate though my husband had a minor accident setting up our van hitting his head & causing a gash. We couldn't find our first aid kit. A lovely staff member by the name of Ana came to our rescue and alerted another staff member who promptly brought a first aid kit & help clean and patch up my husbands wound. Her name was Rhi & she was amazing! Also Jordan came to the van and assisted. We were really impressed with their professionalism. Ana popped by the next morning to check up on us again. Thank you to the 3 of you for your caring nature and we will be back again.
Kerri and Erwin

Close walk into the town with cafes, restaurants, shops and bars. Great facilities and additional activities for families. We had a ensuite camp site and it was fabulous. So nice to have a clean, private bathroom while camping.
Lovely quiet park. Clean amenities. Has a pond with turtles and fish in it.
Delightful, tidy park with perfect location. Booked our return visit on check out.
Were there for us travellers caught by flooding on the route south

Tree loppers covered our car, van and awning in wood chips. We were given no warning and couldn't even move the car out when the trucks turned up.

The mess was reported to front desk staff who said the manager would give us a call. No apology was offered and the manager didn't even bother to call.

Nice park.
Amenities good
One of the best. Great amenities for kids. Good clean bathrooms. Large attractive gardens
Large spacious and clean chalet. Had a swim in the pool. Friendly staff.
Great park, friendly and easy going staff, clean facilities and close to shops and beach
Great holiday park— staff and management very good.. excellent location very secure and relaxing
Such a lovely cabin, location and stay

Wir waren für insgesamt 4 Nächte am Discovery Park! Preis-Leistung war alles in allem super. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und der Campingplatz ist sehr sauber und ordentlich gehalten. Zahlten für die powered-site für 2 Personen im campervan 38$ pro Nacht. Kleiner Abzug jedoch da aktuell der größere von beiden Pools - ohne genannte(n) Grund/Gründe - geschlossen ist…der andere Pool ist eigentlich zu klein und ständig gefüllt mit Kindern.

Gerne wieder :)

I absolutely loved staying in the Deluxe safari tent. Had all the culutery provided. Great view of the pond. The colour scheme of the tent actually made it feel as If you were staying in the Safari. 😅🥰 My kids also loved all the amenities provided for children. Jumping pillow, games room and play ground area. Definitely look forward to staying there again.
Lovely surrounds, very clean and friendly helpful staff.  Close to esplanade without being in the in noise. Great live music on the weekend to enjoy while relaxing.

The cabins are the cleanest cabins I have ever stayed in in a caravan park. The air conditioner was on when we got here, soft music playing and all round exceptional. |The housekeepers here go above and beyond |Highly recommend to any family. |⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Had a fantastic stay. Plenty to do and awesome staff.

Extremely Disappointing Service

We made a booking over the phone on the 2nd, about an hour before reception was due to close, as we still had credits to use. The staff member confirmed the booking, but there was a slight issue with my second name because it’s European and harder to spell. She assured us it wasn’t a problem and told us to send the correct name via email.

We sent the email within one minute, only to receive a reply shortly after saying the booking was no longer available because a walk-in customer had been accommodated instead. This is completely unacceptable, as our booking had already been confirmed.

To make matters worse, we tried following up via Discovery and email but never received any response or apology.

This experience has completely ruined our trust in this park, and we won’t be coming back.

This was easy process. Came in for late check-in and had all the information needed when I arrived directions were easy to room provide map to get to room. Plenty of parking. Room was clean and tidy. People in park were quiet and was very peaceful environment.
Couldnt wait to leave the woman from reception was very rude we cut our stay short the park wasnt very family friendly

Pet friendly, budget friendly, great location and a lovely place to stay. We had a powered ensuite site and it was just great! The roads are a bit tight inside the park. A smile from the young girl in recepetion would have been a bit more welcoming but overall a great park and I would definately stay again.
Located in a central position with onsuit at every site. A bit tight for bigger Vans but still okay

We enjoyed a week in the Eco tent with a comfortable bed, furnishings and shower. We needed to move the lounge for better alignment of the T.V as it is  fixed, not on a swivel and has a small screen.
Although the Eco tent is roomy and comfortable, it is still a tent. BYO earplugs unless you're happy to listen to the frog lullaby and be woken very early by the birdlife chorus.
Park surrounds maintained well. Easy walk to eateries. Staff friendly and helpful. We left feeling very rested.

We'll be back again.

We stayed in several discovery parks on our journey from Sydney to Cairns in a camper. This site was by far the best of the lot. The kitchen/Pool/Toilet facilites were spotless and in close proximity to the camping area. At night the site is very quiet and is also a destination that the local Fraser Island tour companies will collect you from.
great location, awesome accomodation. Plenty on for kids too. Would most definitely stay here again.

Great place to stay with kids and family.
Playgrounds and pools and best of all a jumping pillow

Loved our stay! We were only there for a night stopping on our way to Yeppoon. Beautiful grounds and lovely ensuite. The kids area was wonderful and lots of shade for the sites and everyone was very respectful and quiet. Heading back for another few nights and excited to stay here again.

For starters we had a late check in and the lady I
spoke to on the phone was super friendly and helpful.She explained how a late check in worked and eased all my concerns.

When we arrived at the property the kids were absolutely stoked with the location as it was right near the swimming pool and jumping pillow. Then we walked into our cabin, it was super clean spacious and homely. We placed our things away and immediately went for a swim in the pool.

It was a perfect location to the beach, restaurants, ice cream and playgrounds all in walking distance! And only a few minutes drive to all other activities we had booked in. We highly recommend and have already spread the word to everyone.
Thank you so much!

What a great find, this caravan park is. Within walking distance to the bay, local shops, pubs & restaurants.
Such helpful, attentive, accomodating staff, prepared to ‘go the extra mile’ for guests (even supplying bottled water when the council interrupted our water supply). The grounds are well maintained with crystal clear pools, kids playgrounds, a great camp kitchen & bbq area, clean fresh ammenities & laundry.

Charming little park with more than enough amenities for the average person. Spacious sites, and, despite the fact that one third of the park is being repaired, it didn't feel cramped. Friendly management who were prepared to do anything for us

The cleaners are great as well.

Also, the bird and turtle life is brilliant!

My only complaint? The way some people treat these beautiful places and dedicated staff! These places should be able to rate customers! "Paying for a service" doesn't equate to "treat people and places like garbage"

Thanks guys! Would camp here again
Clean park, great staff and close to beach.

Cabin is big and clean and easily one of the better cabins we have stayed in. The park itself is a little cramped with caravans but the cabins are beautiful and very well laid out. Would defo stay here again.

From booking to dropping our keys off - such a great experience. The customer service from the staff onsite is excellent and most importantly, friendly. The location is only a 5min walk to the esplanade, where there are plenty of options for food. Communal kitchen onsite, clean toilets and showers, pool was perfect. Would love to stay here again.
Got the trifecta 3 G'Day parks 3 of the most impossible sites ever created If you have a big van impress upon whomever you speak to that that is the case.

While back from the beach would seem a disadvantage, we found it actually a much quieter location and really only a short walk to the beach and nightlife.
The facilities are very good and regular events like life bands, bingo and sausage sizzles are great.
Sites are very generous and relatively easy to get onto.
Great park nicely laid out 2 pools and a lake

Absolutely lovely experience! The receptionists when i was checking in and out. One of the ladies (I think her name was Shae )in reception went above and beyond in making sure i had everything i need and answered all my questions. The grounds staff did a great job in making this place look so nice and green! can’t wait to come back next year
A lovely place to stay, staff very friendly and always around maintaining the park, entertainments are a great idea, amenities are clean

Probably one of our favourite locations.  We were upgraded to a Safari tent right on the lake.  The tent was amazing.  It had an awesome balcony and even a bbq on the deck.  Service was amazing, staff very friendly.  Lots of bird life, even saw eels and tortoises in the lake.  Stayed 2 nights but could have stayed much longer.  A great location also, could walk down to the beach and walking trails.
Not as good as it looks on TV.

I stayed 2 nights in a dog friendly "luxury cabin" on the far side of the park. The cabin appeared clean on arrival so I had no reason to check the bed before I slept in it. The bed was comfortable and the fridge a good size.   On my last day, however, I stripped the bed to find foreign hair and old blood stains in the linen. There was also extensive mould in the bathroom ceiling and tiles. As I was leaving early, I left a note for management with my keys and later in the day they emailed to say they had refunded one night due to my complaint. The offer of partial refund was appreciated, however the experience of knowing I'd slept in a bed with somebody else's hair and blood still leaves me feeling disgusted. The mould and lack of exhaust fan in the bathroom also suggests a lack of overall maintenance and review by management. In the parks favour the management seemed receptive to the complaint and seem to want to fix it.
Loved the park especially the staff, they were great
Very good and clean holiday park. We enjoyed our stay at a powered site.

Easy check in, kids loved the play equipment and turtles! Beautiful park and lots for the kids in the park. There was only 1 dryer working at my end of the park and and one out of order. The other laundry at the front had several dryers however another also out of order. Still enjoyed our time.
Great place to stay friendly and clean .
A lovely place to stay

Nice park , but seriously keeping the lawns mowed and the edges trimmed is great but the main entrance only needed some 20 mm blue metal in the ever increasing number of ditches and potholes .     Apparently it wasn't done while we were there for 2 weeks because they said it would push out to the sides.
All the guests along that stretch of road were " not happy Jan"
Understandably so.
One little thing that could have made a huge difference in my rating and I guess others as well.
I know it's on the calendar to get done professionally in a few months but it really gave the park a bad look.
We enjoyed the location and staff were very friendly.
Great park 👏 👌

A nice park close to everything. We booked 6 months in advanced and was told we had an upgrade to an ensuite powered site.We were very disappointed with our upgrade that was on a very small site lucky to fit our car on .The road was on a very dirty dusty section on the entry road (about 8 sites long ) and every vehicle went past covered us in dust. Some guest were watering the road to keep the dust down to keep the dust out. Disappointing experience. We were happy to leave.
Very clean and tiny park. Staff very helpful. Would definitely stay again.

The little cabin we stayed in was outdated which was a let down it didn't have the charm that was portrayed on the websites photos , top bunk needs a clean in cabin 705. You'll be surprised what you see when you get up to clean .

Nice staff and location

We stayed in our van with an ensuite. Lovely park, pet friendly, Staff are lovely people and keep the park looking very tidy and clean. 2 pools kids playground with a jumping pillow. Laundry facilities. Walking distance to shops. Short drive to supermarkets. Our 2nd time there.

We really loved our stay at Discovery Hervey Bay. Our cabin was spotlessly clean and as we were arriving in the evening, we really appreciated that the heating was already on. The park is very well kept and all guests seemed very happy with the facilities. There are also some safari tents if you like glamping! Would definitely stay here again.
Fences to low....public to easy to jump fence and steal.....

The cabins are nice we've stayed in then a few times and the camp sites are great even next to the jumping pillow amd pool at Xmas wasn't to bad we still had time to winde down this time around we stayed on an unsuite grass site and it's so handy having amenities at your door we love coming here and it's so close to everything

A fantastic park, very well maintained and clean. Great facilities, amenities and family friendly activities. The amenities near us were fantastic, toilet and shower in one room, like a private ensuite which was great with the kids and always spotlessly clean.
The staff were fantastic, from our booking, greetings and interactions throughout the stay. A special thanks to Dave who was very kind after i took in my caravan awning and lost, he also gave great recommendations for the area.
Great job team!!
Thanks for having us.
3rd visit here. Powered site. No complaints. Love the heated pool and camp kitchen.

We just had 2 nights here. Brilliant. A self contained villa. Clean, private. Comfy bed, good shower 🚿 location is fabulous. Walk to the Esplanade and eating places. We took bikes that we could lock up on the sundeck. Lovely clean bins around the park. Ideal for caravans and motor homes. We will definitely be back.
ที่พักสะอาด สะดวก สวยงาม ครบครัน บรรยากาศดีมาก

Stayed here whilst visiting family in Hervey Bay... Handy location,  short walk to the beach, pet friendly,  good facilities if you have children,  Tracey in reception is great as are the rest of the staff

Fantastic area with lots of trees and plants and very well laid out. We stayed in a safari tent, and it was amazing. Great amenities, very spacious and totally clean. Terrific spot to sit outside on the terrace next to the lake.|Definitely recommend.

This is our go to park when we are at Hervey Bay. Great for kids and now dog friendly too.
We loved the location.
The pools are a little small for peak times but  still good.
Clean and tidy. Our bed was soooo comfy and clean. We had a dog friendly cabin which was clean and we liked the position in the park.

We stayed 3 nights over the Easter weekend on powered sites with ensuites and absolutely loved it! Great location a street back from the main esplanade, really nice holiday park with easy access onto caravan sites. Lots of fun things for the kids to do, very family friendly! We've booked again for next year! Highly recommend

Wow we had a fantastic time over this Easter2024 long weekend.
The staff are so helpful, friendly and go above and beyond in every area. All activities run like well oiled machine, super clean it's a credit to every single staff member well done.
I will definately recommend the park to others.

Our stay in the deluxe safari cabin was amazing!! Situated right on the garden bed where turtles, ducks and fish swim up to be fed.  The cabin itself is perfect for a family of 4 and is very clean.  The park boasts two pools, playground and jumping inflatable.  You can also hire bikes or pedal carts for cheap.  Close proximity to the esplanade and specialty shops, I highly recommend our stay and we will be back.
First contact was a lady who was quite grumpy I felt like I was not welcome ,
Room was better than expected. Large, clean and new. Our toddler loved the pools and the turtles in the lagoon. We'd definitely stay again.

Will not be booking or even consider staying at or recommending this place. I made a booking through Wotif and I unfortunately had to cancel and had cancelled within the fully refundable cancellation date, just to still have $292 taken from my account the next day. I had contacted Wotif and they had emailed and called and got no answer, I had also tried to call and sent an email and got the same response, which was nothing. It’s now been close to two weeks and no sign of a refund even though I have email proof that I am entitled to a full refund. Absolutely appalling service, communication is disgusting and unacceptable. Extremely disappointing.
Excellent a faire
Conveniently close to town, decent accommodations.

Toller Campingplatz. Wir haben zwar keine kleinen Kinder mehr, für Kinder ist hier aber einiges geboten. Kostenlose Gokarts zum ausleihen, 2 Pools, ein Teich mit Schildkröten, Jumping Aerea, etc. Es gibt viele Stellplätze mit privatem Bad. Preis-Leistung Top. Auch die Mitarbeiter der Reception sind voll engagiert und sehr nett und hilfsbereit.
Good park. Overpriced ask for a better deal when booking in. Close to the beach and two pools to pick from

Great location close to the beach. Facilities are clean and easily accessible. Reasonably sized sites, easily fit a 12-man tent and gazebo on our lot. Had a great time camping here with friends for New Years!
Great place to stay, close to everything.

Deluxe Cabin
Groß, sauber, sehr gut ausgestattet.
Schöne Anlage, gute Lage.

Enjoyed this Park.
Staff always acknowledged you with a G'day/ Hello: your guests then feel included in the park family.
Our cabin was A1.
Thank You.

6 days camping had ensuite beautiful clean park. Lots of things for kids to do they had kids activities every day our granddaughters had an a great time. Amazing staff they go above & beyond to help you. We will be back
Jane
Cabins were meticulously cleaned, our family loved this park and the facilities were top notch. All of the staff were so helpful and accomodating, we decided to stay an extra night!

I hired a 4 seater pedal car which I paid for in full at the office, as I only had a little over half an hour to use the Kart . The office lady was very persuasive that I bring the Kart back on time , which I was more than happy to do and did . So I go out side and discovered that a vendor had blocked access to allow me to remove the kart .  I made the vendor lady aware politely that she has blocked the karts in , she ignored me and went back around to the front of her trailer. I went into the office and told the lady at the counter and she said she would call her maintenance man .   I told her that I’ll just be taking the child’s kart and I’ll be back on time. I go back to the office on time after my child used the single kart and was offered no refund for the hire of the 4 seater kart that I couldn’t use. I was only offered a refund when I told her that it’s poor for that she didn’t offer me a refund. I think it’s very sad that a company has to go to their level to try and get money for services that aren’t used and are paid for. I thought the park was amazing and the young gentleman who helps you back into the sites is truly a big asset to their company. He was very knowledgeable and professional in his manner also.

A great  place  to stay!  Clean and
well  kept. Service  was very prompt when we had concerns. Also had the most amazing informative free  snake  and reptile show while we were there. I'd come again just  for that. Loved the pancakes available  on Sunday mornings  too! Breakfast  is ready 😁👏 Had a wonderful  time and was  so close to the beautiful  Harvey Bay beach and pier. Thanks to all.

Brilliant . Would have given 6 stars .
We’ve stayed in some good sites over the last 3 weeks and this was the best . A cut above due to the management and staff.
Each arrival is escorted to site and assisted in parking - our van is pretty big so this is a huge help . All sites are level and well maintained. Facilities are clean and good.
Short walk to the beach and many cafes.
Everything is dry at the moment but sites were not overly dusty .
Cute lake with ducks.
Dogs are welcomed and the night we were there we enjoyed a sausage sizzle and music evening .
Kids area looked good.
We do love our TV , as our site was under trees we were given a direct aerial connection which gave us a perfect signal .
It’s the little things that make a difference .
Thanks for a stress free couple of nights, we will come back for longer .

Our experience started with a friendly welcome and some expert assistance putting our van on site 18 alongside our travel companions.

The grass site was a great size, although on a busy corner, which it did not cause any concerns as there was plenty of room for our van and car to be safely out of the way.

The park is beautifully laid out with pools (heated) at either end. The camp kitchens are clean and tidy with loads of equipment and cleaning gear supplied. All the facilities were clean and tidy and really maintained with care and attention.

It’s a short walk to the beach and shops with loads of choice for food and drinks and a small supermarket too. More larger supermarket stores and anything  else you may want are only a short drive away.

Great park, great location, great staff. We would recommend a stay at Fraser Street.
Really enjoyed our stay here. We were given a superior cabin when we arrived. So comfortable and had lots of room if you were coming in a group.

The second five stars in our two week travel
From the  minute we pulled up to check in, the staff was fantastic. we left a day earlier, then planned, but 2 weeks on the road is enough. The staff were fantastic with us, changing our booking a couple of times thanks to all the staff the owners should be very proud of their staff

Great park. The safari tents were wonderful. Our first time clamping. Great camp grounds. Sausage sizzle and live music night was fantastic. Andrew the manager was extremely efficient and helpful. A great asset. Nothing was a problem to him. Would highly recommend.
Great man helped us back our van in. Very tight sites. Great facilities
First time here on way home from FNQ. Fabulous park - spotless grounds and amenities and in great location. Special thanks to Craig who is an absolute gem, so helpful, funny and all round gentleman
A bit tight but assistance is offered by staff
Good location,  not on the beach but not far to walk.clean and well managed.

My review for discovery parks Fraser street

Amazing! We checked in the superior cabin, as soon as we got in it was beautifully made up and the blankets and sheets were folded in a neat pile. I went out and I was amazed by the fun attractions, such as the bouncy pillow, the gaming room, and the nice friends I made. Definitely recommend if you are looking for a budget place to stay and not luxury style, on the last day I got a go kart out, they were in very good condition and I really enjoyed playing around, this place is one of my favorite parts of my trip, very close to esplanade so there is a lot of yummy eats.

Beautiful location, staff, facilities & gardens. Fantastic kids programme and all so conveniently located just a short walk to the cafes, shops, playgrounds & beaches of the stunning Hervey Bay. Cannot wait to come back

This park is our favourite of favourites. Beautifully presented park. The amenities are very clean and the gardens are pristinely kept. The staff are very friendly and go out of their way to help you. We will always stay there when we visit Hervey Bay.
We had a nice cabin, very neat and tidy!

Second visit here, staff are friendly and the facilities well maintained. Good central location so you can walk to the Esplanade and many businesses.  Nice small lake in the middle with some wildlife. Bouncing pillow for the kids, a couple of pools.

This park and unit we had would rate as the best value for money of any unit we have had this trip. It is close  to the beach and facilities. The unit was well presented with above attention to detail. The check in lady took extra time to give information  on the park and facilitiee
We love it been coming for years.cant get enough of the place.
Great clean park.
One of my regular stops in Hervey Bay. Nice rooms and facilities.
Lovely Caravan Park quiet and well maintained. Very friendly staff and very helpful.
